calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Certain Asset Is Trust Property And Confirming Powers Of Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terence Mayo for Judy Speck.

Mr. Mayo explained how the property was acquired, stated that they do not have an exhibit A, that they do not know if there was an exhibit A and that the drafter of the deed inadvertently failed to include the entire (100%) property. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Certain Asset Is Trust Property and Confirming Powers of Trustee (subject to review of the order) stating that there is enough evidence to support that they are dealing with scrivener's error.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
